ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment fund */,
  "fund_manager" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager responsible for the fund */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund was established */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment fund */,
  "fund_category" TEXT /* Category of the investment fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of investment fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share class */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund the share class belongs to */,
  "share_class" TEXT /* Name of the share class (e.g., retail, institutional) */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the share class */,
  "share_class_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the share class */,
  "minimum_investment" TEXT /* Minimum investment required for the share class */,
  "management_fee" TEXT /* Management fee associated with the share class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_classes_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_nav" (
  "nav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAV entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the share class associated with the NAV */,
  "nav_date" TEXT /* Date for which the NAV is calculated */,
  "daily_nav" REAL /* The daily net asset value for the share class */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day's NAV */,
  "dividend_factor" REAL /* Dividend factor for the share class */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the share class on the nav_date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_nav_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the user (e.g., read-only, read-write, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the performance report (e.g., text, HTML) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of performance report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly, etc.) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the performance report (e.g., PDF, CSV, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_composition" (
  "fund_composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund composition entry */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund the composition belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset in the composition */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the asset in the fund composition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_composition_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of user activity (e.g., login, report generation, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
